label: 第155話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 虎杖は秤と対面し、秤が求める「熱」について話を合わせる。しかし綺羅羅から高専関係者の侵入を知らされ、秤は虎杖を敵と判断する。
summary_full: 秤は虎杖へ、人が賭け事や恋愛で発する「熱」を操りたいという自身の思想と、呪術師の賭け試合を合法化する構想を語る。虎杖は会話を合わせて協力を取り付けようとするが、綺羅羅から伏黒とパンダの侵入を知らされたことで高専の人間だと露見する。秤は高専上層部への不信から虎杖を攻撃し、列車のドアを思わせる扉で挟み込む。屋上では綺羅羅が五条の封印を信じず、星間飛行で伏黒とパンダを分断する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 is able to get a meeting with 秤 where they discuss the " fever ". It's the fever that brings people to gamble and 秤 wants to take advantage of mankind's fever with his fight club. Before 悠仁 can get a word in, communications suddenly break down when 綺羅羅 is able to get a warning to 秤. At the same time, 恵 and パンダ continue working convincing 綺羅羅 they're only at the fight club to ask for help.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 秤 discusses the " fever " with 悠仁. 秤 asks 悠仁 if he believes that he could make one million yen a month by working one hour a day. Confused, 悠仁 asks what he would need to do, but for that information, he would need to pay 秤 two hundred thousand yen. Obviously a scam, 悠仁 tells 秤 he wouldn't agree to something like that because it's shady. 秤 agrees and points out that its a classic con where get rich quick scammers sell tips. It's an obvious scam but 秤 notes that there are a lot of people out there who still fall for it. 秤 believes it all has to do with the " fever ". In a con of this type, both the scammer and the scammed are in fever to change their lives. People get high on the fever and make foolish choices, but people can't even fall in love without it. 秤 loves the fever and asks 悠仁 if he knows the most direct way of engaging with it. 悠仁 guesses correctly and says that its gambling. Apparently lots of girls who hate gambling dumped 秤 in the past but he points out that life itself is a gamble. Society tramples on losers who don't know when to quit but 秤 points out that everyone gambles, what people hate is losing and going to ruin. 秤's meeting with 悠仁 interrupted by suspicious phone call. 悠仁 says that some people want to live peacefully but 秤 claims not to know anyone like that. 秤 wants to control the fever of the entire country using his fight club. The existence of 呪霊 have been made public and changes to jujutsu regulations are inevitably coming. 秤 wants to take advantage of this and expand his business, making jujutus headquarters aware of his ambitions. 秤 accuses 悠仁 of being a spy for 呪術高専 and attacks him. Excited for the future, 秤 needs strong allies and asks 悠仁 if he wants to get high on the fever with him. 悠仁 prepares to bring up 呪術高専 and ask for help but they're interrupted by a phone call. 秤 lets his phone ring until it goes to voicemail. He offers 悠仁 a drink although he's underaged and brings up that 五条悟 can't drink either. 悠仁 pretends not to know who 五条悟 is, but this is suspicious because 悟 is someone that every sorcerer is aware of. 秤 finishes his drink and confrontational asks if 悠仁 is a spy from 呪術高専. 綺羅羅's reaction to hearing 五条悟 was sealed. Before 悠仁 can speak up to defend his case, 秤 tosses the drink glass right at his face. 悠仁 deflects the cup but 秤 activates his 術式 , summoning two tall sliding doors that attempt to close with 悠仁 between them. 悠仁 jumps above the horizontal doors and tries to speak up but 秤 continues to attack. 秤 reveals a call from 綺羅羅 means that something is amiss. 悠仁 recalls what 恵 said about only asking for cooperation and headbutts 秤. The third-year doesn't give up any ground and 悠仁 asks him to listen, only for 秤 to refuse because now his fever is running cold. " If we convince 綺羅羅, negotiations with 秤 will go more smoothly! " Meanwhile, while 綺羅羅 is at a deadlock with パンダ and 恵 due to their technique, 恵 decides this is the best time to talk. 恵 explains their not on 呪術高専's side and they need 秤's help but 綺羅羅 isn't very receptive. 恵 asks what happened between them and the higher-ups and パンダ explains that conservative members of the community prefer traditional jujutsu while 秤's has blended with technology. 綺羅羅 points out that 呪術高専 lost because they have their priorities backwards. They add that they always have 五条悟 to clean up their messes so why ask for help. 恵 tries to reveal that 悟 got sealed but 綺羅羅 makes a face of comic disbelief that makes it obvious they don't believe 恵 at all. 恵 decides to activate 脱兎 , summoning dozens of his rabbit 式神 . He and パンダ know 綺羅羅 is the closest person to 秤. If they can convince 綺羅羅, negotiations with 秤 will go more smoothly.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: ガチンコファイトクラブ
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 伏黒恵 & パンダ vs. 星綺羅羅 虎杖悠仁 vs. 秤金次 (開始)

key_events_verified_phase8: 秤が「熱」と賭け試合合法化の構想を語る
虎杖が高専関係者だと露見する
秤が虎杖を扉で攻撃する
綺羅羅が五条封印の説明を信用しない
伏黒とパンダが星間飛行で分断される
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
